entity.summary: Seychelles-operated cryptocurrency derivatives and spot exchange winding down after announcing that exchange services will end on 23 September 2026. New registrations stopped immediately, with reduce-only trading scheduled from 26 August before final closure.
entity.notes: BitMEX announced a phased wind-down on 23 July 2026. The exchange remains operational for existing users during the transition, so HEI uses limited rather than dead. New account registrations stopped immediately; risk limits are scheduled for 26 August, and exchange services are scheduled to end at 04:00 UTC on 23 September 2026. The status, death reason, and death date should be reviewed again when the effective closure occurs.

expected.summary: Cryptocurrency derivatives exchange founded in 2014. HEI records BitMEX as an active exchange with event-backed regulatory history, including U.S. enforcement actions, a 2021 CFTC/FinCEN settlement, founder guilty pleas, and a later company plea/fine.

changes.summary: Seychelles-operated cryptocurrency derivatives and spot exchange winding down after announcing that exchange services will end on 23 September 2026. New registrations stopped immediately, with reduce-only trading scheduled from 26 August before final closure.
changes.notes: BitMEX announced a phased wind-down on 23 July 2026. The exchange remains operational for existing users during the transition, so HEI uses limited rather than dead. New account registrations stopped immediately; risk limits are scheduled for 26 August, and exchange services are scheduled to end at 04:00 UTC on 23 September 2026. The status, death reason, and death date should be reviewed again when the effective closure occurs.

events.title: BitMEX announced exchange closure
events.description: BitMEX announced that exchange services will end on 23 September 2026 at 04:00 UTC. New account registrations stopped immediately, and reduce-only limits are scheduled from 26 August during the wind-down.
events.notes: This records the announcement and phased wind-down, not the future effective closure. A shutdown_effective event and dead classification require verification after 23 September 2026.

evidence.title: Where Is BitMEX Incorporated
evidence.notes: First-party identification of HDR Global Trading Limited as the Seychelles-incorporated owner and operator of BitMEX.

evidence.title: What is BitMEX
evidence.notes: First-party description of the BitMEX trading platform before the July 2026 closure announcement.

evidence.title: Important Message from BitMEX
evidence.notes: First-party closure announcement gives the 23 September 2026 closure time, immediate registration stop, 26 August reduce-only transition, withdrawal guidance, and post-closure withdrawal access.

evidence.title: Cryptocurrency exchange BitMEX to shut down
evidence.notes: Independent reporting corroborates the planned 23 September shutdown, strategic-review rationale, asset-safety statement, and instruction to close positions and withdraw funds.
